task: Produce a specialist-facing deliverable assessing cumulative thermal process lethality using only the embedded packet. Calculate lethality for each record using lethality = duration_min * 10^((temperature_C - 80) / z_value_C), compute cumulative equivalent minutes, evaluate remediation option combinations constrained by max_budget, and produce a defensible go/no-go recommendation. Deliverables: thermal_lethality_3.xlsx and expert_memo.md containing formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations to embedded records, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, identification of any missing/ambiguous inputs marked as needs_review, and a final recommendation table.
